lastReleaseMessage: chore: gitignore logs/ (watchdog heartbeat + relaunch log are operational state)

barRaise.topFinding: Second clean review in a row and the project's first since declaring v1. All eight actions from the 2026-06-23 bar-raise are confirmed landed in code: watchdog GET / liveness probe + rotating relaunch log + heartbeat, UI version pill, atomic saveProjects(), reconciled D-009/M6 wording, full tunnel config in ARCHITECTURE.md, .bak scripts removed, and a real v1.0.0 annotated tag. Tree is clean, heartbeat is fresh (server and tunnel green), and the shared work queue drained from 73 to 22 items. Three LOW residuals remain: tunnelUp is process-existence only (not an edge probe, so it can read green during a Cloudflare 1033 outage), the per-boot session secret drops the phone session on a watchdog relaunch, and one 16-day-old pending queue item belongs to a sibling project. No HIGH or MEDIUM findings. The strategic move is restraint: v1 is done and in daily use.
